See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 4122 => 'Genf', 4126 => 'Freiburg', 4127 => 'Sitten', 4131 => 'Bern', 4132 => 'Biel/Neuenburg/Solothurn/Jura', 4141 => 'Luzern', 4143 => 'Zürich', 4144 => 'Zürich', ];
